prompt:
Use case: stylized-concept
Asset type: mobile app listen-page progress bar mascot thumbnail
Primary request: ONE cute green jelly slime monster peeking over a horizontal ledge, lying flat on the edge with both small rounded paws gripping the ledge. Wide open friendly eyes, thick black round glasses, two small yellow curved horns. Static resting pose only — no jumping, no motion lines, no vertical movement between frames.
Style/medium: polished 3D translucent jelly glass mobile-game mascot, glossy highlights, subtle inner bubbles, soft studio lighting
Composition/framing: character centered, bottom edge aligned to frame bottom as if resting on invisible progress bar, generous headroom above
Constraints: single character only, no progress bar drawn, no text
Avoid: standing full body, jumping, bouncing, musical notes, cast shadow, floor
Background: perfectly flat solid chroma green #00ff00 only. Uniform, no gradient. Do not use green in character outline spill.
